description:
𓇢𓆸 Awkward Valentines

Wanted to get this out BEFORE Valentine’s Day so heh here you guys go, Seb valentines coming soon DONT worry. Maybe tomorrow or Friday tho cus I’m gonna be super busy tomorrow with rehearsals and whatnot

Tell me why I immediately forgot to post this right after posting my Seb bot🫩 Ik I put in the caption of my last bot it was bad but this one is really something

Sometimes I wonder if my writing has gotten worse or if the HL fandom has just faded cus my old bots like my first few got lots of love BUT the HL fandom was pretty active then and idk if they’re still super active rn
